questionHtml: The reaction is first order with respect to HCl. Calculate the time taken, in seconds (s), for half of the Mg to dissolve when [HCl] = 0.5 mol dm–3.
markschemeHtml:
«2×170 s» = 340 «s» ✔

 

Accept 320 – 360 «s».

Accept 400 – 450 «s» based on no more gas being produced after 400 to 450s.

meta.title: The reaction is first order with respect to HCl. Calculate the time taken, in seconds (s), for half of the Mg to dissolve when [HCl] = 0.5 mol dm–3.
